form.formComment: Missed the frame latest (31.00) when seventh over 525m at The Meadows in a Grade 5. Goes well out of this box with a win and two minors. Looks hard to beat with even luck.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Missed the frame latest (31.00) when seventh over 525m at The Meadows in a Grade 5. Goes well out of this box with a win and two minors. Looks hard to beat with even luck.

form.formComment: Started big odds last time but hit the ground running with a sensational early split, giving a sight but fading late to finish second (28.17) at this track over 500m. Has an outstanding 28.14 best time at this course and distance. Big chance.

formComments.title: TAB

form.formComment: Good effort to win last start by 1.75 lengths over 450m at Shepparton in a handy (25.76), beating Thought Of That. Will find this a bit tougher, others read better.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Good effort to win last start by 1.75 lengths over 450m at Shepparton in a handy (25.76), beating Thought Of That. Will find this a bit tougher, others read better.

form.formComment: Won two starts back after racing on the pace at Warragul over 460m in 26.31. Followed that up with a minor placing over 500m at this track at Grade 5 a week ago. Happy enough to dismiss in this field.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Won two starts back after racing on the pace at Warragul over 460m in 26.31. Followed that up with a minor placing over 500m at this track at Grade 5 a week ago. Happy enough to dismiss in this field.

form.formComment: Finished second at big odds last time (22.37) over 390m at Shepparton. Drawn awkwardly. Solid top-three prospects.

formComments.comment: Finished second at big odds last time (22.37) over 390m at Shepparton. Drawn awkwardly. Solid top-three prospects.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Checked and stumbled on first turn.

form.formComment: Good effort to win last start by 1.5 lengths over 350m at Healesville in a handy (19.56), beating Sun In Cuba. Will find this a bit tougher, happy enough to dismiss in this field.

form.formComment: Big odds last time but hit the ground running with a strong early split, giving a sight but fading only late to finish third (28.29) at this track over 500m. Boxed on well last time to hit the frame. Rates highly again.

form.formComment: Last start winner at Shepparton over 450m running a time of 25.20. Looks the one to beat again.

formComments.comment: Last start winner at Shepparton over 450m running a time of 25.20. Looks the one to beat again.

form.formComment: Ordinary effort last start when sixth over 350m at Healesville. Prior to that won by one length at this track (23.92) beating Burn Along in a Mix 3/4 on March 20. Is a danger.

formComments.comment: Ordinary effort last start when sixth over 350m at Healesville. Prior to that won by one length at this track (23.92) beating Burn Along in a Mix 3/4 on March 20. Is a danger.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Quick to begin; Raced wide entering home straight.

form.formComment: Was a winner three back at Shepparton then finished in the minors before missing the frame last time when fourth (24.96) at this track. Has ability but needs to find best and others make more appeal.
